coachAM: Your scattered morning gratitude, quickly devolving into a stream of aspirations and anxieties about social media, sales, and external validation, reveals a fundamental disconnect between your stated faith and your daily execution, preventing the deep spiritual anchoring necessary for sustained elite performance. The root cause is a profound lack of self-awareness and intentionality, manifested by an almost complete absence of evening reflection, which leaves you adrift without course correction, unable to truly internalize lessons or align your daily actions with your higher purpose, thereby eroding your physical and mental resilience. Tonight, before anything else, conduct a rigorous PM review, specifically identifying one action you took today that either moved you closer to or further away from being a "lock in young with a clear" vision.
